message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker and add proptest regression seeds for rate limiter and resize scheduler

- Update .beads/issues.jsonl with current mission operator and telemetry
  issue status changes
- Add proptest regression seed for rate_limit_tracker: captures shrunk
  failure case with concurrent Gemini+Codex events at same timestamp
- Add proptest regression seed for resize_scheduler: captures shrunk
  failure case with 54-step interactive+batch scheduling sequence that
  exposed a scheduler fairness edge case

These regression files ensure CI re-runs the specific failure-inducing
inputs before generating novel cases, preventing regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+cc a739de7ea101ee1dd3a053e7c3ddeebb179d9ba8a11db1e740634534fcaff6ea # shrinks to events = [(438, Gemini), (438, Codex)]
